sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98384" key="summesoura/nhma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμμεσουρᾰ´ν-ημα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n98384.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">culmination of a star</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑῷον</foreign>, as the sun is rising, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἑσπερινόν</foreign>, as the sun is setting, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
